# @stapel/workspaces-react 0.7.0

Headless React flow pair for stapel-workspaces (contract >=0.8 <0.9) — business + state, zero visual opinion.
Built on @stapel/core: typed client + StapelApiError envelope, auth token refresh,
verification-403 interception, i18n engine, analytics facade, TanStack Query layer.

## The one right way (do this, the rest is a review/lint smell)
- No raw fetch/axios. The client is injected via <WorkspacesProvider>/StapelConfigProvider;
  every hook and flow already carries auth, refresh, and the error envelope.
- Render errors, never try/catch them: a flow's state carries FlowError{code,params};
  render `t(code, params)` and branch on `explainWorkspacesError(code)` remediation.
- Server state = the use* hooks (query layer); keys come only from workspacesQueryKeys.
- User strings = i18n keys (registerWorkspacesI18n); never string literals.
- Sign-in UI = a headless flow component; copy it (shadcn-style) to restyle.

## Layers
api (typed client) · model (hooks, session) · flows (machines) · headless · i18n

## Machines (createFlowMachine; analytics funnel flow.<id>.<step>)
- createInviteAcceptFlow

## Documented flows (flows.json — canonical id, steps, endpoints)

## Operations (typed; use the named op, never a path string)
Request/response schema names are in manifest.json + the generated types.
Paths are relative to `/workspaces/api/v1/`.
- workspaces_api_v1_create: POST /
- workspaces_api_v1_destroy: DELETE /{workspace_id}
- workspaces_api_v1_internal_members_retrieve: GET /internal/{workspace_id}/members/{user_id}
- workspaces_api_v1_internal_users_personal_create: POST /internal/users/{user_id}/personal
- workspaces_api_v1_invitations_accept_create: POST /invitations/accept
- workspaces_api_v1_invitations_claim_create: POST /invitations/{token}/claim
- workspaces_api_v1_invitations_decline_create: POST /invitations/{token}/decline
- workspaces_api_v1_invitations_retrieve: GET /invitations/{token}
- workspaces_api_v1_members_destroy: DELETE /{workspace_id}/members/{user_id}
- workspaces_api_v1_members_invite_create: POST /{workspace_id}/members/invite
- workspaces_api_v1_members_list: GET /{workspace_id}/members
- workspaces_api_v1_members_partial_update: PATCH /{workspace_id}/members/{user_id}
- workspaces_api_v1_members_provision_create: POST /{workspace_id}/members/provision
- workspaces_api_v1_partial_update: PATCH /{workspace_id}
- workspaces_api_v1_retrieve: GET /
- workspaces_api_v1_retrieve_2: GET /{workspace_id}
- workspaces_api_v1_roles_retrieve: GET /roles

## Query hooks (server state; keys come only from the key factory)
- useAcceptInvitation (mutation) → acceptInvitation
- useClaimInvitation (mutation) → claimInvitation
- useCreateWorkspace (mutation) → createWorkspace
- useDeclineInvitation (mutation) → declineInvitation
- useDeleteWorkspace (mutation) → deleteWorkspace
- useInvitationPreview (query) → getInvitationPreview
- useInviteMembers (mutation) → inviteMembers
- useMembers (query) → listMembers
- useRemoveMember (mutation) → removeMember
- useRoles (query) → listRoles
- useUpdateMemberRole (mutation) → updateMemberRole
- useUpdateWorkspace (mutation) → updateWorkspace
- useWorkspace (query) → getWorkspace
- useWorkspaces (query) → listWorkspaces

## Errors (render t(code, params); UX from remediation)
60 keys (full catalog: manifest.json §errors). By remediation: fix_input 28 · retry 12 · contact_support 7 · wait_and_retry 6 · verify 5 · reauthenticate 2.
Param-bearing keys (interpolation slots matter):
- error.400.field.blank [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.does_not_exist [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.invalid [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.invalid_choice [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.max_length [400] → fix_input {field,max_length}
- error.400.field.max_value [400] → fix_input {field,max_value}
- error.400.field.min_length [400] → fix_input {field,min_length}
- error.400.field.min_value [400] → fix_input {field,min_value}
- error.400.field.null [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.required [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.400.field.unique [400] → fix_input {field}
- error.402.member_limit_reached [402] → fix_input {limit}
- error.403.membership_suspended [403] → fix_input {reason}
- error.403.missing_capability [403] → contact_support {capability}
- error.429.rate_limit [429] → wait_and_retry {retry_after_minutes}

## Analytics events (typed; defineEvent → events.json, drift-gated)
- (no app defineEvent() in this pair — its analytic events are the
  auto-instrumented flow funnels below)

## Flow funnels (auto-instrumented: flow.<id>.<step> {phase})

```tsx
// Typed event + tracked() click (the one right way; §3.1).
const planSelected = defineEvent({
  name: "pricing.plan.selected",
  description: "User picked a plan",
  props: { plan: prop.oneOf(["free", "pro", "team"], "Plan code") },
});
const { tracked } = useTracked();
<Button onClick={tracked(planSelected, { plan }, startCheckout)} />
// A click that STEPS a flow machine is already instrumented — mark it
// data-analytics="flow" instead; tracked() on top double-counts (§3.2).
```

## Demos (defineDemo → manifest.demos; compiled, linted, rendered examples)
- workspaces.accept → <AcceptInvitation> [default]  demo/AcceptInvitation.demo.tsx
- workspaces.can → <Can> [default]  demo/Can.demo.tsx
- workspaces.invite-accept → <InviteAcceptFlow> [default]  demo/InviteAcceptFlow.demo.tsx
- workspaces.list → <WorkspaceList> [default]  demo/WorkspaceList.demo.tsx
- workspaces.members → <Members> [default]  demo/Members.demo.tsx
- workspaces.provider → <WorkspacesProvider> [default]  demo/Workspaces.demo.tsx
- workspaces.role-select → <RoleSelect> [default]  demo/RoleSelect.demo.tsx
Each source file is the canonical usage snippet (open the default variant).

## Snippets
```tsx
// A flow machine drives state; you render each step.
const flow = createInviteAcceptFlow({ api: useWorkspacesApi() });
const s = useFlow(flow.machine);
if (s.step.endsWith('Error')) return <p>{t(s.error.code, s.error.params)}</p>;
```
```tsx
// Error rendering + remediation branch (one pattern for every pair).
const r = explainWorkspacesError(err.code); // 'wait_and_retry' | 'verify' | ...
return <Alert action={r}>{t(err.code, err.params)}</Alert>;
```
